== Notes for [[Item:Q107631|Q107631]] ==

Basrah.
--------------------
40. ISA.ARUMI-9 .
was born in Madinah. Another name for ISA.ARUMI-9 was Isa AL-AZRAG.
Have 30 Boys, 5 Girls.
Reference Link: http://freepages.family.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~naqobatulasyrof/main/des/d9.htm#i17
Reference Link: http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/a/s/y/Naqobatul-Asyrof-Jakarta/WEBSITE-0001/UHP-0017.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001490103810

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
